questions.question: A circle has a radius of 5. What is the circumference?
Find the area of a circle with diameter 8.
A circle with center (3, −2) and radius 6 passes through the point (x, −2). If x > 3, find x.
questions.explanation: Points on the circle satisfy (x − 3)² + (−2 − (−2))² = 36. This gives (x − 3)² = 36, so x − 3 = 6, thus x = 9.

questions.question: An arc on a circle with radius 10 subtends a central angle of 36°. What is the arc length?
A sector of a circle with radius 4 has a central angle of 90°. What is the area of the sector?
A line is tangent to a circle with center O and radius 7 at point P. If OP = 7, what is the angle OPT, where T is any point on the tangent line?
questions.explanation: A radius to a point of tangency is perpendicular to the tangent line. Therefore, the angle between OP and the tangent at P is always 90°.
